column5: I started the year with a pretty interesting ratio of 1.28:1 for number of films by a director. On 14 October 2021 I reached a milestone of 500 directors from 646 logged films, spanning 41 countries, inspiring my 2022 goal of watching 100 movies introducing myself to that many more new directors. As of completion of this goal, my ratio is 1.33 movies per director with over 700 directors logged. I look forward to seeing where it's at when I hit 1500 movies logged tl;dr: for every movie on this list, 2022 is the first time I’ve seen something from that director.
